## Security Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, passwords, or tokens in any file
- [ ] `.env` is not staged or committed
- [ ] `.env.example` contains no real values
- [ ] All new API endpoints validate inputs with Zod schemas
- [ ] No credentials logged to console
- [ ] No raw SQL (Drizzle ORM exclusively)
